reviews.review_description: This is a 1st rate game on the GO graphics. Physics control. And replay ability and downright  fun to play plus multiplayer. THIS HAS IT ALL.  Well worth the price and I highly recommend  you download it .All in All a great addition to your game library

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. We will release CYBER TENNIS on other models as well, but we will continue to update this game for the Oculus Go   as much as possible. Thank you for loving this game.

reviews.review_description:
This is my second review. I enjoy this game but every time there is an update on playability, it changes the game and I can't hit a freaking ball anymore. I tried calibrating and it still sucks. The physics or the racket swing or whatever is messed up, please fix this! I was in a final match and this update happened and it threw off my whole game. Very frustrating. Please FIX. Put it back the way it was or something. FIX it.
Update: I appreciate you saying the timing and playability is as it was before but it's not. It is somewhat better but I can still tell that it is still off. I'll have to re-calibrate and see how that works. Maybe 1/2 to 3/4 star more. Thanks for responding.
Tutorial needs to be streamlined however. Gameplay engine itself is well done.

developer_response.body:
We will make efforts to make the tutorial more enjoyable. We are planning to remodel it to be realistic practice.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
Many options, but not sure if everything is working corerectly. Serving is confusing. The calibration is a great idea, but it’s still not simulating my real strokes re pace, direction and spin. Very promising for real tennis players if it simulates real strokes. Interface is a bit confusing, but hopefully the bugs will be worked out. Very exciting first version.

Edit: justtried latest version 4/5/20. Lots of good improvments, but cant get calibration to work correctly. it places me up at net when I am supposed to hit a forehand.  Calibration is essential - are there any docs? Very hard to understand the proper way to do this.
purchased recently for go but it wont let me enter my name and start game, i can point with controller but not click, tried uninstalling and re-installing but no luck, any help?

developer_response.body: I'm very sorry, but there is a problem that it does not work properly when setting a left-handed controller. It's easy to fix bugs, but Oculus Go has already stopped updating and can't fix bugs. Sorry to trouble you, but please play with the controller setting in your right hand. If you set "Left-handed" in the in-game settings, you can play with your left hand. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I like the game and it's fun to play but UI is really ugly. So many fonts and colors shows how bad user interface design is. It is Really confusing at times and hard to understand. Please please hire a game ui designer and fix it. Otherwise a best tennis game on oculus go currently.
Very nice and well done VR tennis game both for adults and kids. Not clear how pepole around the person wearing the goggles can watch the match. Could you please clarify?

developer_response.body:
To watch the game, select the "WATCH THE GAME" menu, the name of the nearby player will come out.
Unfortunately, we can not watch without installing this application.
In the future, we plan to distribute applications that we can watch on smartphones.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
With a little more development this could be the best game on vr, 
I use it everyday, my real tennis has improved fantastically, I am buying 2 more oculus go headsets because I could not imagine life without this game, I’m playing a high level of Tennis without needing to be on court all the time as I have had many surgeries, it allows me to turn up ready to win without actually having to play all week. I have just purchased another go headset before they are discontinued so that if my present one breaks down I still can have this game. I hope when Oculus go is no longer available that I don’t lose this game.
If I had one wish it would be that training mode is available offline so I can use it on aeroplane on way to tournaments.

reviews.review_title: Terrible now but used to be fantastic
reviews.review_description: Not sure what’s happened to this game but there does not seem to be any control anymore. Used to be really cool when I first purchased it. I guess it must be the update. I will have to stick to sports scramble now if I want to play tennis.
This game for me is very hard to figure out. Cannot seem to control my tennis￼ racket and whenever I try to go back to practice cannot find that either.￼

developer_response.body:
It is different from the button operation game, so it may take some time to get used to the operation.
You can practice from the TRAINING menu on the far right after selecting the GAME MENU.
If you get used to the operation, the first enemy is weak and you will be able to win.
I would appreciate it if you could be patient.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description: Would love to play against friends, Is there a Cyber tennis group on facebook? While the lifelike of playing tennis is very good, the interface and settings are so complicated. I did the tutorial twice and I still don't understand everything. And sadly playing against a friend does not work at all. Hope there will be some good updates in the futur because this could be the best tennis game.

developer_response.body:
Yes, there is a player community.
https://www.facebook.com/groups/338959016681471/

We are also developing for platforms other than Oculus Go so that we can have more opportunities to compete. Of course, cross play is possible. We will release CYBER TENNIS for Oculus Rift in the near future.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description: This game is challenging and fun! It takes a while to learn how get-the-hang-of it, but once you do...its great! I play this 2 or 3 times a day. Great work!
Enjoyed this !  Into it!

reviews.review_title: OMG!!! I didn't think they'd do it!!!!
reviews.review_description: This is so awesome!!! I thought I would mention the fact that there is no crowed  response when you play. I didn't actually think anyone would do anything about it but man y'all did and it's amazing!!!! Total changes the atmosphere of the game. 5bhugecstars best game on the Go by far. Way to go guys and I don't even like tennis. Those guys over there making those golf games should take a lesson from y'all. Very impressed!!!!!!!!!! GET THIS GAME

developer_response.body: Thank you very much. We will continue to make improvements to make the game better. please looking forward to.

reviews.review_description: Very fun.  Need room to swing though!

I really dug this game and then they did the latest update...and I dunno what happened! Shots spray all over, overheads go in weird directions, rackets grips seem off. Used to be able to beat players on the regular and now it all seems off.

I’ll still play, just disappoint they changed so much.

developer_response.body:
The timing of shots was adjusted and updated.
Reverted it as before.
Thank you for your report. And thank you for your patience.

reviews.review_description: UI is somewhat messy, but gameplay is really interesting. I like it. Practice, Tour and Partner acquisition mission is good. Moreover you can watch the partner bots match in the stands.

Really enjoy this tennis game. Very realistic. I do wish there was a 75 skill level player in missions. It is quite a jump in skill level from 50 to 100.
Update:
As you progress to speedier rallys and try to put spin on serve, the racket position constantly gets out of wack and ruins good rally.  Is there a fix for this?

I’m not sure what a lot of the bizarre visuals and terminology are. It’s maybe Korean? Confusing graphics that desperately need to be cleaned up and simplified. It seems like it is trying too hard. It’s fun to play though and challenging.

A complex, in depth game.  Once you get the hang of it, the gameplay is awesome.  A lot more fun than I had expected.  The more you play, the more your player develops.  Great game and very well made.
